info.name: AMS Vehicle API
info.description:
REST API for SHS In-Home Asset Management System vehicle data.

## Authentication

All `/api/v1/*` endpoints require the `AMS-API-Key` header.
The `/health` endpoint is publicly accessible.

## Data Sources

- **Vehicles**: VIEW_VehiclesTest1 (or VIEW_Vehicles fallback)
- **Techs**: VIEW_Techs + shared_tbls.dbo.view_Employee
- **Lookups**: Various TBL_Vehicle* tables

## Stored Procedures

- `PROC_VehicleUserDefinedUpdate` - Update user-defined fields
- `PROC_UpdateVehicleRepairTest` - Update repair information
- `PROC_VehicleRepairHistoryTest` - Complete repair and record disposition

## Sample Data

- **VIN**: 1FTNE1EW0EDA37902
- **Vehicle Number**: 47415
- **Tech ID**: RMAR280
- **Region**: 0000830
- **District**: 0008935

request.description:
Update user-defined fields for a vehicle.

**Stored Procedure:** PROC_VehicleUserDefinedUpdate

Only provide the fields you want to update - existing values are preserved for
fields not included in the request.

Updates fields: color, branding, interior, sctTune, address, zip.

Side effect: Adds comment 'User fields updated.' to TBL_VehicleCommentsHistory.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

request.description:
Update the technician assigned to a vehicle.

**Direct SQL:** UPDATE TBL_Vehicles SET Tech, TechName, UpdateDate

Validates techEnterpriseId exists in VIEW_Techs.
Auto-populates techName from VIEW_Techs if not provided.
Adds comment documenting the tech assignment change.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

request.description:
Add a comment to the vehicle's comment history.

**Direct SQL:** INSERT INTO TBL_VehicleCommentsHistory

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

request.description:
Retrieve all comments for a vehicle.

**Direct SQL:** SELECT FROM TBL_VehicleCommentsHistory WHERE VIN = ?

Returns comments ordered by UniqueID DESC (newest first).

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

request.description:
Update repair status and rental information for a vehicle.

**Stored Procedure:** PROC_UpdateVehicleRepairTest

Use this endpoint when a vehicle enters repair status (not yet completed).
For completing repair and creating history, use the repair-disposition endpoint.

**Important:** finalDisposition and finalDispositionReason are always set to 0 for this endpoint.
When rentalCar=2 (YES-Rental), both rentalStartDate and rentalEndDate are required.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

item.name: Complete repair and create history record

request.description:
Finalize vehicle repair and create a repair history record.

**Stored Procedure:** PROC_VehicleRepairHistoryTest

Use this endpoint when completing a repair. Creates a history record and resets repair status.

**Required:** finalDisposition and finalDispositionReason must be > 0.
When rentalCar=2 (YES-Rental), both rentalStartDate and rentalEndDate are required.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

request.description:
Get a single vehicle by exact VIN.

**Source:** VIEW_VehiclesTest1 (falls back to VIEW_Vehicles)

Returns 404 if VIN not found.

request.description:
Search for vehicles by VIN, plate, or vehicle ID.

**Source:** VIEW_VehiclesTest1 (falls back to VIEW_Vehicles)

At least one search parameter must be provided. Returns matching vehicles
with full details including organization, tech assignment, location, specs,
condition, repair status, and audit fields.

request.description:
Search for technicians by name, LDAP ID, or last update date range.

**Source:** VIEW_Techs

Returns tech info including organization hierarchy, tech details, and equipment.

At least one search parameter is required.

request.description:
Get all vehicle operational status options (runs/doesn't run).

**Source:** TBL_VehicleRuns

Options include: UNKNOWN, Vehicle is Operational, Runs Needs Battery, etc.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

request.description:
Get all vehicle appearance/condition options.

**Source:** TBL_VehicleLooks

Options include: UNKNOWN, Good, Fair, Poor, etc.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

request.description:
Get all repair service reason codes.

**Source:** TBL_VehicleServiceReason

Options include: Accident, Engine Failure, Transmission Failure, etc.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

request.description:
Get all repair status codes.

**Source:** TBL_VehicleRepairStatus

Options include: Legal Hold, Needs Tow to Another Shop, At Dealer, etc.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

request.description:
Get all final repair disposition codes.

**Source:** TBL_VehicleRepairDisposition

Options include: Vehicle Sold/Term, Vehicle Non Repair, Vehicle Repaired, etc.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

request.description:
Get all disposition reason codes.

**Source:** TBL_VehicleDispositionReason

Each reason is linked to a disposition type via Disposition_ID.
Options include: Cost to Repair too High, Does not Run and High Mileage, etc.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

request.description:
Get all rental car status options.

**Source:** TBL_VehicleRepairRentalCar

Options include: SELECT (0), NO-Rental (1), YES-Rental (2).

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

request.description:
Health check endpoint.

Returns service status and database connectivity.
No authentication required.
